name: bookkeepers managing 5–15 clients using QuickBooks tool
description: For bookkeepers managing 5–15 clients using QuickBooks, inconsistent transaction records cause cash flow gaps. We provide an automated reconciliation service instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Difficulty in reconciling transactions across multiple platforms
